<!--
This module is a Kotlin extensions companion for protowire-java —
codec changes belong upstream there (or in trendvidia/protowire for
spec changes). See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## Summary

What this PR changes, in 1–3 sentences.

## Why

Link to the issue or upstream change that motivated this.

## Scope

- [ ] Kotlin extensions (`src/main/kotlin/`)
- [ ] Tests (`src/test/kotlin/`)
- [ ] Build / CI / repo plumbing (`build.gradle.kts`, `.github/`)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Test plan

- [ ] `./gradlew build` clean
- [ ] If new public extension: covered by a test under `src/test/kotlin/`
- [ ] If wire-impacting: matching upstream PR linked above
